headline: POV: When The Barista Misspells Your Name For The 47th Time And You Just Accept It
summary: Her coffee cup now says 'Kevn' and she's started introducing herself that way.
fullBody: TikToker Brittany Misspelled has chronicled her coffee shop struggles for 2 years. The barista has written 'Brittani,' 'Britny,' 'Brittney,' and most recently 'Kevn.' 'I've given up,' Brittany said, holding a cup that says 'Brynn.' She now answers to any name starting with B. The barista has been given 'extra training' but insists 'names are hard.' Brittany is considering legally changing her name to 'just a B with a smiley face.'
